text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I see Gold City talking with Director
Akikawa in the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Many thanks! I apologize for being so abrupt, but
in order to accommodate the delivery date...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I understand. You can leave it to me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
They're planning a photo shoot for the welcome
brochure to give to new students. I was asked to
sub in for the model.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume on the Phone
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I'm sorry! Hic... Why did I have to catch a cold now of all times?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, please don't cry! We all come down
with a cold from time to time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Excuse me... Could I talk to her?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No need to cry. I'll be covering for you, okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume on the Phone
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm s-sorry I'm such a burden to everyone...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you know that's not true. All you need
to focus on now is getting better!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Eat something nutritious and get some rest! That's
all I have to say, okay?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume on the Phone
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Good answer. If you can give that good of a
response, you'll be landing another job in no
time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's get started. I'll be needing my
signature racewear in addition to our uniform,
right?

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Let's start with some shots of you coming to
school!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's move inside the school grounds! That's
it! I like that face!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's get into that signature racewear
now. Whoa, that's very cool! Give me one more!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right. Now, some running shots to wrap up.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Amazing... She knows just what we're looking for.
So glad we're working with a pro.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff B
text_block_list.text:
I know. She's amazing. The shoot's going so
smoothly we'll probably be done an hour early.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The staff is right—Gold City has been nothing but
professional during the shoot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks different from when she usually runs.
Her radiance makes her appear... distant.

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
We've got just a few shots left, so show me your
top asset!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: My top asset...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Can I talk to you for a second?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yes, you. What do you think is my best asset?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I didn't know you thought that about my
running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh... A bit overdramatic, but thanks.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Pfft.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're sending me. I'm "gritty," huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're pretty much the only one who'd tell
me something like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Gold City goes to take her last few
shots.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thanks, guys.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff B
text_block_list.text:
Man, that was fantastic. You really showed off
your own unique spark in those last running shots.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The staff is right—she was perfect all throughout
the photo shoot. But then, why did she...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's up, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Why did you ask me what your asset was?
Why did you ask me what your asset was?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She should've already known the answer to that.
Why would she need to go out of her way to ask
me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Look, modeling is all about giving the client what
they want.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So I asked for your input. They wanted my top
asset, and you know what that is better than
anyone—even myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Because, well... you're my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under the light of the setting sun, I see in her
expression not the pro model from the photo
shoot just now, but a student of Tracen Academy.
